title: Lift Maintenance Technicians (MNC/ Need Own Motor/ West)
description:
Highlight

  • Japan MNC
  • AWS + VB

Summary

To perform preventive and corrective maintenance works on equipment, and standby duties as required so that the equipment can function properly and safely

Responsibilities

  • Carry out preventive and corrective maintenance works in accordance to the schedule
  • Carry out corrective maintenance work as when required
  • Observe safety work procedures
  • Ensure proper keeping and use of tools
  • Observe proper work behavior while working
  • Perform standby works when requires
  • Follow-up on breakdown report and assist Standby Section where required
  • Report to the superiors on all matters relating to team
  • Carry out any other duties as assigned by the superior
  • Keep proper records of of works carried out in the relevant reports
  • Attend to the building or equipment inspections as required, by law (BCD, FSB)
  • Assist in conducting and investigating of damages/accidents to equipment or personnel
  • Follow up on QC and QA defects.
  • Ensure compliance to Environmental policy, reduction of waste and prevention of pollution

Requirement

  • Experience in lift industry welcome
  • Min Nitec or related study


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref70@trustrecruit.com.sg

Please include the following information:

  • Reason for leaving
  • Expected Salary

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

EA License No: 19C9950

EA Personnel: Bong Cheong Leong (Alan)

EA Personnel Reg No: R25158271
